titleStmt.title: SII 9.59: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 59. (A.R. No. 73 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE WEST SIDE OF A RUINED TEMPLE CLOSE TO THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is an undated record belonging to the reign of the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Indaravallabha who bore the biruda Raṭṭa-Kandarpa. While his feudatory bearing the title Birudara-Ṟoṭṭa (?) was ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred and Māsiyavāḍi onehundred-and-forty as a Sāmanta, he made a gift of būdagūḷ to Baḷiyara Bādamma, with the consent of the Mahājanas of Bāḷuguḷi. Bādamma is stated to have made over the gift to the tank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . samasthapṛthivīvallabha mahārājādhirājapati
mahāsāmaṁtādhi vamśōdbhavaṁ lattalūrapu
raparamēśvara pañcama paṟeghōṣaṇaṁ garu
ḍadhvaja garuḍalāñcanaṁ Indaravallabhā
raṭṭakandarpa samastha birudara ṟoṭṭaṁ
kōgaḻināḍu Aynūṟu māsiyavāḍi nūṟunālvattu
manāḷe bāḷuguḷiya mahājana Ayvadiṁbaruṁ U
bhayasammatadoḷiḻdu baḷiyara bādammage būdagū
ḻanittor Ātanuṁ keṟege koṭṭā(ṁ)nidanayvadimbaruṁ
salisuvōrbṛhaspati kumbadoḷire paḍedoṁ bāda
mmaṁ Ārānu�vo dānavanaḻidoruḷḷoḍe vārāṇa
siyuṁ śrīparvvatamumaṁ kavileyuṁ kavileya kaṟuvuma
naḷidor paṁcamahāpātakaṁ . sva(ḥ)dattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō vā hṛtya vasundharāṁ . svānayōniśataṁ gārddhabha
cāṇḍāḷēṣvabhijāyatē .
Digital edition of SII 9.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
